title: Vigo, Galicia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Vigo, Galicia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Vigo is a city in Galicia with a population of 295,000. Galicia’s largest city with a stunning natural harbor, beautiful islands, fresh seafood, and a strong maritime tradition.

Last updated: July 11, 2026
